title: 50pcs Christmas Place Cards Table Name Cards for Table Setting with Holly Pine Branches Merry Christmas for Table Decoration Winter New Year Wedding
features: 🎄Christmas Place Cards: You will get 50pcs of double-side printed Merry Christmas place cards with classic Christmas elements like holly and pine branches, suitable for table setting and party decoration
🎄Quality Material: Made of high-quality paper, these place name cards are thick and strong. Please let the place card dry for several minutes before using it
🎄Suitable Size: The Christmas name place card measures 8.5 x 11cm unfolded and 8.5 x 5.5cm after folded, having enough room for you to write guest's name on it
🎄Christmas Design: This Christmas place card is designed with various Christmas symbols like holly, pine branches and words "Merry Christmas", which all make the place card more exquisite and elegant
🎄Wide Application: These place cards are wonderful decorations for Christmas party, dinner, wedding or new year gathering, bringing warmth and happiness to your guests
